title: CSA S16-24 Steel Member Design
description: Design standard and custom steel members in accordance with CSA S16-24.

report_mode.description: Report Style. Symbol: Type. Choose between detailed and concise reporting styles.

section.description: Section. Symbol: Section. Select Custom to edit section dimensions.

steel_grade.description: Grade. Symbol: Grade. Select Custom to edit section yield strength.

d_input.description: d. Symbol: d. Units: mm. Total height (or diameter) of section.

b_input.description: b. Symbol: b. Units: mm. Total width of section.

t_f_input.description: tf. Symbol: t_f. Units: mm. Flange thickness, or top/btm wall thickness (RHS/SHS) or CHS thickness.

t_w_input.description: tw. Symbol: t_w. Units: mm. Web thickness, or side wall thickness (RHS/SHS).

r_input.description: r. Symbol: r. Units: mm. Fillet radius.

f_y.description: Fy. Symbol: F_{y}. Units: MPa. Section yield strength.

frame_type.description: Frame Type. Symbol: Frame Type. Specify whether the member is part of a braced or unbraced frame. Refer Clause 13.8.1 for further context.

laterally_supported.description: Flange Lateral Support. Symbol: Lateral Support. Specify whether the member's compression flange is laterally supported or unsupported. If supported is selected, lateral torsional buckling checks will be skipped.

w2z.description: ω2. Symbol: \omega_{2}. Moment distribution coefficient for bending about z-z axis

w1y.description: ω1,y. Symbol: \omega_{1,y}. Load distribution factor according to 13.8.6

w1z.description: ω1,z. Symbol: \omega_{1,z}. Load distribution factor according to 13.8.6

Kz.description: Kz. Symbol: K_z. Effective Length Factor for critical elastic moment in the major axis

Lz.description: Lz. Symbol: L_z. Units: mm. Unbraced length for the critical elastic moment in the major axis

Ky.description: Ky. Symbol: K_y. Effective Length Factor for critical elastic moment in the minor axis

Ly.description: Ly. Symbol: L_y. Units: mm. Unbraced length for the critical elastic moment in the minor axis

Kt.description: Kt. Symbol: K_t. Effective Length Factor for Torsional Buckling

Lt.description: Lt. Symbol: L_t. Units: mm. Unbraced length for Torsional Buckling

Kf.description: Kf. Symbol: K_f. Effective Length Factor for Flexural Buckling

Lf.description: Lf. Symbol: L_f. Units: mm. Unbraced length for Flexural Buckling

Mz.description: Mz. Symbol: M_{z}. Units: kN-m. Required flexural strength for bending about the major (Z) axis. Positive value results in compression at top of section.

My.description: My. Symbol: M_{y}. Units: kN-m. Required flexural strength for bending about the minor (Y) Axis. Positive value results in compression at right of section.

Vy.description: Vy. Symbol: V_{y}. Units: kN. Required shear strength in major (Y) axis direction.

Vz.description: Vz. Symbol: V_{z}. Units: kN. Required shear strength in minor (Z) axis direction.

N.description: N. Symbol: P. Units: kN. Required axial strength. Positive value represents compression.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
